title: AWSLakeFormationDataCellsFilterProperties
description: A resource schema representing a Lake Formation Data Cells Filter.. Source:- <https://github.com/aws-cloudformation/aws-cloudformation-rpdk.git>

TableCatalogId.description: The Catalog Id of the Table on which to create a Data Cells Filter.

DatabaseName.description: The name of the Database that the Table resides in.

TableName.description: The name of the Table to create a Data Cells Filter for.

Name.description: The desired name of the Data Cells Filter.

RowFilter.description: An object representing the Data Cells Filter's Row Filter. Either a Filter Expression or a Wildcard is required

ColumnNames.description: A list of columns to be included in this Data Cells Filter.

ColumnWildcard.description: An object representing the Data Cells Filter's Columns. Either Column Names or a Wildcard is required

CatalogIdString.description: A string representing the Catalog Id.
CatalogIdString.title: AWSLakeFormationDataCellsFilterCatalogIdStringDefinition

NameString.description: A string representing a resource's name.
NameString.title: AWSLakeFormationDataCellsFilterNameStringDefinition

RowFilter.description: An object representing the Data Cells Filter's Row Filter. Either a Filter Expression or a Wildcard is required.

AllRowsWildcard.description: An empty object representing a row wildcard.

RowFilter.title: AWSLakeFormationDataCellsFilterRowFilterDefinition

ColumnWildcard.description: An object representing the Data Cells Filter's Columns. Either Column Names or a Wildcard is required.

ExcludedColumnNames.description: A list of column names to be excluded from the Data Cells Filter.

ColumnWildcard.title: AWSLakeFormationDataCellsFilterColumnWildcardDefinition
